title: Heating Element Failure
shortDescription: The heating element or its relay has failed.
fullDescription: Error E01 on Neff dishwashers (similar to Bosch/Siemens as they share the BSH platform) indicates: The heating element or its relay has failed. This error prevents normal operation until resolved.

causes.cause: Primary component for heating element failure has failed

symptoms: Error may flash as LED blink code

fixSteps.title: Reset the dishwasher
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off and disconnect power for 5 minutes. Restart and observe.

fixSteps.title: Inspect related components
fixSteps.instruction: Check the component indicated by the error for visible damage or blockage.

fixSteps.title: Test electrically
fixSteps.instruction: Use a multimeter to test the suspected component.

fixSteps.title: Replace if needed
fixSteps.instruction: Replace the faulty component and run a test cycle.

whenToCallPro: If basic troubleshooting does not resolve the error, contact a Neff or BSH service technician.

faq.q: What does Neff error E01 mean?
faq.a: The heating element or its relay has failed.

faq.q: Are Neff error codes the same as Bosch?
faq.a: Yes. Neff, Bosch, and Siemens dishwashers share the BSH platform and use similar error code systems.

faq.q: How do I fix E01?
faq.a: Start by resetting the dishwasher. If the error returns, check the component indicated by the error code. Many issues can be resolved with basic troubleshooting.
